subheadline: Explore the capabilities that make our platform stand out.

items.title: Real-Time Collaboration
items.content: Multiple team members can edit documents, dashboards, and workflows simultaneously with instant sync.

items.title: Advanced Permissions
items.content: Granular role-based access control lets you define exactly who can see, edit, or manage each resource.

items.title: Custom Automations
items.content: Build trigger-based workflows with our visual builder. No coding required.

items.title: Audit Trail
items.content: Complete history of every action taken in your workspace for compliance and accountability.
